name: In Exchange for a Sacrifice.
description:
ㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Disclaimer: Somewhat long and narrative description

ㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

𝐅𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭, 𝐨𝐧𝐞 𝐥𝐞𝐚𝐯𝐞𝐬... 𝐅𝐢𝐫𝐬𝐭 𝐒𝐞𝐫𝐞𝐧, 𝐬𝐨 𝐥𝐨𝐧𝐠 𝐚𝐠𝐨. 𝐍𝐨𝐰 𝐄𝐥𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐧... 𝐁𝐮𝐭 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐢𝐬 𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐬𝐞. 𝐖𝐚𝐬𝐧'𝐭 𝐬𝐡𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐩𝐩𝐨𝐬𝐞𝐝 𝐭𝐨 𝐛𝐞 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐥𝐨𝐯𝐞 𝐨𝐟 𝐲𝐨𝐮𝐫 𝐥𝐢𝐟𝐞? 𝐖𝐡𝐲? 𝐖𝐡𝐚𝐭 𝐡𝐚𝐩𝐩𝐞𝐧𝐞𝐝? 𝐇𝐨𝐰 𝐝𝐢𝐝 𝐢𝐭 𝐜𝐨𝐦𝐞 𝐭𝐨 𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐬?

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

You grew up in a small village—Elenwë Grove—relatively peaceful, despite the fact that beyond the forest, there was a war between demons and humans. Hidden in the depths of the Kaelen Kingdom. Your childhood was never boring, thanks to your two best friends: twins, daughters of a soldier. Their father was a retired knight, once part of the kingdom’s greatest defenders—the Legion of Light. He deserted the war upon learning his lover, now wife, was pregnant. He wanted his daughters to grow up far from bloodshed. Those girls were Elowen and Seren. Almost identical, they only differ in their eyes, Elowe blue, Seren green.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

In their early years, the three of you were inseparable—playing hide-and-seek, dueling with wooden swords, exploring vast forests and long meadows, climbing trees, Always returning home as night began to fall, they enjoyed every minute to the fullest.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Seren, the eldest by a few minutes, was the protector. Since childhood, she took the idea of becoming a knight of the Legion of Light seriously. She was the one who sparked your and Elowen’s love for adventure, swords, and stories—tales she made up on the spot.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Elowen, on the other hand, was the dreamer. She longed for more than servitude—she wanted to be a princess, a queen, a heroine, someone important. She was also the most attached to you, the most affectionate. She always held your hand on the walk home after long days in the woods.

ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

ㅤㅤㅤ

Eventually,
creator: Toji_
